reasoning: The FedRAMP CA-7 control focuses on continuous monitoring, which in a Kubernetes context can be mapped to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and properly configured to retain logs for a specified duration. Additionally, monitoring changes to network configurations can be related to ensuring that NetworkPolicies are monitored for changes. Admission controllers can also be monitored to ensure that any changes to policies are logged. These checks ensure that the Kubernetes environment is continuously monitored for security-relevant changes.
title: Continuous Monitoring
